name: LinkedIn Outreach
product_docs:
AI-powered pre-screening system that replaces resume-based filtering with real engineering skill 
  assessment using system design interviews (instead of leetcode-style). It automatically filters thousands of
   candidates into a targeted shortlist based on actual engineering ability.
campaign_objective:
Sell an AI pre-screening system to engineering hiring managers and TA leaders that replaces leetcode-style
   interviews with system design assessments, cutting cost-per-hire and reducing bad hires.
